name: Calendar
description: A calendar component for selecting single or multiple dates with month/year navigation and date range restrictions.
usage_guidelines: Use for date selection in forms and date pickers.
Enable multipleSelection for selecting multiple dates.
Set minDate/maxDate to restrict selectable range.
Use disableDate function for complex date restrictions.
Customize appearance with dayClassName and dayStyle.
Handle onChange to capture selected date(s).

value.description: Selected date(s). Array when multipleSelection is true.

onChange.description: Callback fired when date selection changes.

firstDayOfWeek.description: First day of week in calendar.

styling_info.visual_description: Grid-based calendar with month/year header navigation. Days are clickable cells with hover and selected states. Disabled dates have reduced opacity. Multiple selections show all selected dates highlighted.

Dont: Don't forget to handle null values
Don't use for time selection (use TimeInput)

Basic.title: Basic

CustomRender.title: Custom Render

DisabledCertainDate.title: Disabled Certain Date

DisableOutOfPeriodDate.title: Disable Out Of Period Date

MultipleDateView.title: Multiple Date View

MultipleSelection.title: Multiple Selection
